description_long: This is a wooden baseball bat with a natural light brown finish and a dark gray grip tape wrapped around the handle. The barrel of the bat is reinforced with a metallic band featuring protruding spikes, giving it a rugged, weaponized appearance. The handle is slightly tapered and ends in a rounded knob, while the barrel is thick and cylindrical. The metallic band is positioned near the thickest part of the bat, adding a distinctive and aggressive visual element. The wood grain is visible throughout the bat, and the grip tape appears to be tightly and evenly wrapped. There are no visible brand logos, markings, or decorative graphics on the bat.
description: A wooden baseball bat with a dark gray grip tape and a spiked metallic band around the barrel, featuring a natural wood finish and no visible markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bat, the dark grip tape, and the spiked metallic band around the barrel.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view highlighting the circular cross-section and the prominent metallic spikes encircling the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wood grain, grip tape, and the metallic band with spikes from another angle.
description_view_3: Handle-end view focusing on the rounded knob and the grip tape, with the metallic band visible in the background.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: The grip tape is dark gray, appears to be smooth with a matte finish, and is wrapped in a simple, even spiral pattern with no visible designs or logos.
attribute_end_cap_design: The end cap is a rounded wooden knob, matching the handle in color and material, with no distinct markings or logos.
